title: Read, Unread, Star, Tag, Bulk Action, and Conflict Semantics · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for read, unread, star, tag, bulk action, and conflict semantics and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, compiler, network, XML, PostgreSQL, race, load, accessibility, deployment, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for consistent personal reader-state model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.
Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Count Reconciliation
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go team handles case 1468 during an accessible community-news reader review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove private reader state, desired-state commands, bulk semantics, conflicts, and count repair; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Derive or maintain unread and saved counts with transaction, cache, repair, and changed-case evidence.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Count Reconciliation.
